sweetThoughts: Because no matter how far apart we are, your smile instantly makes my entire day brighter. HBD Gauri!
Because you are literally sweeter than actual rasmalai, and I am the luckiest guy alive to call you mine.
Because of the way you laugh at my terrible jokes. Never stop doing that.
Because even through a phone screen, you feel closer to me than anyone else ever could.
Because of your beautiful, kind heart. You inspire me to be a better person every single day.
Just a reminder: I love you to the moon and back, Gauri. Today is all about you.

memories.alt: A memory of Gauri and me on a video call
memories.caption: Our late night VCs 🥹
The prettiest smile in the universe
Look at you being a cutie

memories.alt: A screenshot from a video call together
memories.caption: Miles apart, still side by side
This one lives in my head rent-free

finalSurprise.message: I wish I could put this on you myself right now, but until I can... check your doorstep! Wear it and remember I'm always with you. Happy Birthday, my beautiful Rasmalai. I love you! 💖
